mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, tenant_name, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM sys_tenant WHERE status = '0' ORDER BY tenant_id

SELECT t.tenant_id FROM sys_tenant t WHERE t.status = '0' AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_key LIKE '%admin%' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_tenant ut WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND ut.tenant_id = t.tenant_id ) ) ORDER BY t.tenant_id

SELECT t.tenant_id, t.tenant_name, t.status, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark FROM sys_tenant t WHERE t.status = '0' AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_key LIKE '%admin%' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_tenant ut WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND ut.tenant_id = t.tenant_id ) ) ORDER BY t.tenant_id

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_tenant t WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.status = '0' AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_key LIKE '%admin%' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_tenant ut WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId} AND ut.tenant_id = t.tenant_id ) )
